references.title: Elements of Success: Supporting at-risk student resilience through learning analytics

annotations.text: Many learning analytics applications for students at risk now show information to students, which may be even more discouraging for students who receive a notification that they are at risk. Authors use the platform elements of success to show students how they are progressing on a weekly basis.

Paper examines relationship between student a risk usage of Elements of Success and their performance. Not only did the authors find that there was no relationship between knowing to be at risk and student withdrawal, the authors also found that students who checked the system actually were more likely to earn a passing grade relative to peers who never checked how they were doing.
